text:
anticipated. The US will be steering ahead
and take on most of the Iraqi cities amidst deep resistance.
*Lot of oil wells will also be put to fire.
*150-200 people will die from the coalition forces.
*The coalition force will not succeed in capturing Saddam. Saddam will either die or
escape. The probability of Saddam escaping is more.

*One of Saddam’s sons might lose his life.
*Iraqi soldiers will surrender in plenty, and there won’t be any refugee crisis.
*The UN will interfere and take complete control of the situation. The transition will
be smooth. And there won’t be EU aids coming in.
*Coalition forces will have hiccups and they will progress slowly.
*Iraq will become democratical, but the process will be slow.
*United Nations will play an active role in the whole war scenario. The handing over
and UN taking charge will happen after the war.
*There will be couple of more air disasters or loss of planes.
